audio_clips.text: A majestic castle is illuminated under a twilight sky, surrounded by water and lush greenery. A fountain arcs gracefully in the background.
A single purple flower blooms in the, Olaf enters, delighted
Olaf leans to smell a flower; his carrot nose pops off, lands on ice, leaving Olaf stunned.
Sven looks surprised, then grins wide. Olaf steps on the ice, confused. Sven slips and falls forward on the ice.

Olaf uses his twig arm to cross the frozen lake. He slips, scattering his parts. Sven skids in—Olaf reassembles quickly. His head pops off, but he puts it back. The reindeer slides, adding to the chaos.
Sven reaches for a frozen carrot—his tongue sticks. Olaf, in pieces, pulls with a stick. They struggle; the carrot flies onto a snowy patch.
Olaf looks surprised as Sven gets up and runs past him.
Sven runs hurriedly as Olaf grabs on, then clutches his head and looks around confused.
Sven returns, Olaf looks surprised with his carrot nose reattached. Sven jumps happily, then falls in front of Olaf.
Olaf, surprised, grabs his carrot nose with twig arms - his head is missing.

video_name: Trailer - Frozen TEASER TRAILER (2013) - Disney Animated Movie HD
